title: Gamlapi ah Mual Khat Om hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Keima ading sihna athuak, Khuapi pualam oma;
Jesuh singlamteh na om hi, gamla mualpi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Amah in gimna a thuakna, i theizo kei ding
Ahih hang komau tang dingin, Amah in a thuak hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Asi pha tawh sawp saing manin, vantung i tung ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Amah bek in vantung khua-ah, a hong lutsak thei hi.
